zh.Shardlow, Derbyshire, England: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾沙德洛福
zh.Bakewell, Derbyshire, England: 英國德比夏爾貝克韋爾_
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Foljambe於大約1346年出生在英國德比夏爾哈索普時，他的父親Sir Godfrey de Foljambe I30歲，母親Avena de Ireland31歲。他於1387年與Margaret Loudham在英國英格蘭德比夏爾沃爾頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1433年1月7日在英國林可爾史爾享年88歲。

zh-hans.Shardlow, Derbyshire, England: 英国英格兰德比夏爾沙德洛福
zh-hans.Bakewell, Derbyshire, England: 英国德比夏爾貝克韋爾_
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Foljambe于大约1346年出生在英国德比夏爾哈索普时，他的父亲Sir Godfrey de Foljambe I30岁，母亲Avena de Ireland31岁。他于1387年与Margaret Loudham在英国英格兰德比夏爾沃爾頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1433年1月7日在英国林可爾史爾享年88岁。

nameMeanings.name: Foljambe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: nickname from Old French fol ‘foolish, silly’ + jambe ‘leg’, probably a nickname for a lame person, someone with a maimed or crooked leg; compare Belgian . In Old French fol could be used of something useless or of little value, e.g. farine folle ‘mill dust’.

variants.name: Fulljames
meanings: English: variant of Foljambe with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Belgian
meanings: Norman, English, Scottish: nickname from Anglo-Norman French bele jambe ‘fine leg’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Foljambe was born about 1346, in Hassop, Derbyshire, England, his father, Sir Godfrey de Foljambe I, was 30 and his mother, Avena de Ireland, was 31. He married Margaret Loudham in 1387, in Walton, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died on 7 January 1433, in Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 88.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Foljambe est né environ 1346, à Hassop, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Godfrey de Foljambe I, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Avena de Ireland, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Loudham en 1387, à Walton, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 7 janvier 1433, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 88 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Foljambe um 1346 in Hassop, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Godfrey de Foljambe I 30 und seine Mutter Avena de Ireland 31. Er hat 1387 in Walton, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret Loudham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 7. Januar 1433 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Lincolnshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Foljambe è nato il circa 1346 nel Hassop, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Godfrey de Foljambe I, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Avena de Ireland, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Loudham nel 1387, nel Walton, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 7 gennaio 1433, nel Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 88 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Foljambeが約1346年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアハソップで生まれた時，父Sir Godfrey de Foljambe Iは30歳，母Avena de Irelandは31歳であった。1387年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアワルトンでMargaret Loudhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1433年1月7日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで88歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Foljambe(이)가 대략 1346년 영국 더비실르 하소프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Godfrey de Foljambe I(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Avena de Ireland(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1387년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 월턴에서 Margaret Loudham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1433년 1월 7일 영국 링코실르에서 88세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Shardlow, Derbyshire, England: Shardlow, Deorbyscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Foljambe nasceu aproximadamente 1346, em Hassop, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Godfrey de Foljambe I, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Avena de Ireland, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Loudham em 1387, em Walton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 7 de janeiro de 1433, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 88 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Foljambe родился около 1346 г. в местности хассоп, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Godfrey de Foljambe I было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Avena de Ireland, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Loudham в 1387 г. в местности валтон, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер 7 января 1433 г. в местности линколншир, Англия в возрасте 88 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Foljambe nació aproximadamente 1346, en Hassop, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Godfrey de Foljambe I, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Avena de Ireland, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Margaret Loudham en 1387, en Walton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 7 de enero de 1433, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 88 años.
